name: Helsinki-Vantaa

exit_snippets.train: From the arrivals level, follow the "Train" signs down to the rail platform; the Ring Rail line (I/P) runs to Helsinki Central.
exit_snippets.bus: From T2 arrivals, exit to the bus platforms; line 615 runs to Helsinki Central, the Finnair City Bus is faster.

taxi_caveats: Taxi ranks are outside both terminals. Fares are deregulated, so the price is shown on the window sticker before you board; confirm a flat fare to the centre (~EUR 40-50).
